prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-MINICOFFEEMAKER-WHITE Product Type: COFFEE_MAKER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2 in 1 Portable Camping Travel Stainless Steel Mini Coffee Maker, Gloss White Description: Perfect for camping, bring along your lightweight favorite ready to brew coffee pods or capsules and just add hot water; the portable coffee marker from ASR Outdoor is easy to use, comes with a built in, detachable cup and brews hot, fresh, instant coffee in just a matter of minutes.

Weighing in at only 1.05lbs (16.8oz), the mini coffee machine is lightweight, easy to pack and features a cylindrical design, which makes it easy to slide into the side pocket or compartment of a camping or hiking backpack or rucksack. And, whether you’re around the campfire, catching the sunrise or prepping a camp kitchen meal, rest assured you can brew delicious coffee in this stainless steel and food grade plastic coffee or espresso maker, over and over, without compromising on taste or safety.

The one cup single serve or single serve coffee maker can be powered either with AAA batteries (not included) or with the included white USB cable and comes in a gloss white finish.

Let the brewing begin.

Dimensions: 9.5 x 3 x 3 inches

Cup Capacity: 8 ounces Search Terms: instant coffee espresso one cup coffee maker single brew pour over cold brew camping accessories camp kitchen hiking gear travel backpacking outdoors sports work from home portable mini coffee maker equipment supplies kitchen cooking food grade Features: - MINI COFFEE MAKER WITH CUP: Perfect for camping, bring along your lightweight favorite ready to brew coffee pods or capsules and just add hot water; the portable coffee marker from ASR Outdoor is easy to use, comes with a built in, detachable cup and brews hot, fresh, instant coffee in just a matter of minutes - LIGHTWEIGHT COFFEE MACHINE: Weighing in at only 1.05lbs (16.8oz), the mini coffee machine is lightweight, easy to pack and features a cylindrical design that makes it easy to slide into the side pocket or compartment of a camping or hiking backpack or rucksack - HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: Around the campfire, catching the sunrise or prepping a camp kitchen meal, rest assured you can brew delicious coffee in this stainless steel and food grade plastic coffee or espresso maker over and over without compromising on taste or safety - EASY TO CHARGE COFFEE MAKER: The one cup single serve or single serve coffee maker can be powered either with AAA batteries (not included) or with the included white USB cable - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9.5 x 3 x 3 inches; Color: Gloss White; Materials: Stainless Steel, Food Grade Plastic; Power Source: USB or Battery (AAA); Cup Capacity: 8 ounces; Weight: 1.05lbs; Voltage: 3V === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Portable Mini Coffee Maker, Gloss White

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Mini Coffee Maker, Gloss White

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight Single Serve, Built-in Cup, USB And Battery Powered, Stainless Steel, Camping And Travel

openai.title_differentiation: Portable Camping Travel Brewer, Built In Detachable Cup, USB Or AAA Battery Powered, 8 Oz Capacity, Lightweight
